title: Property path not matched in a named subgraph
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_graph (id Int32, name String, property_uri String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, name, property_uri) VALUES (1, 'mbox', 'http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/mbox');
INSERT INTO test_graph (id, name, property_uri) VALUES (2, 'InverseFunctionalProperty', 'owl:InverseFunctionalProperty');
SELECT * FROM test_graph WHERE property_uri = 'http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/mbox' AND id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_graph WHERE property_uri IS NULL OR name LIKE 'mbox%';
key_bug_features: Property path evaluation in named subgraph fails
